chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-854 of 2013 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A 4448/13 2. For Katcha Peshi. 3. For orders on M.A 4449/13 05.03.2018. None present on behalf of the petitioner. No intimation received. It is 11:40 a.m. It appears from the record that this petition was filed on 22.04.2013 since then nobody on behalf of the petitioner is pursuing this petition diligently. It appears that the petitioner has no interest in this matter, which is dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE A.H.
